name: @visuelconcept/wui-machine-fleet-3d
description: Machine Fleet 3D hub page (/machine-fleet-3d) — three.js 3D fleet view with per-machine state/KPI bubbles, stop-cause catalog, contextual machine dashboard (Gantt + Pareto), and an AI assistant. Managers: machineSim (fleet simulation), kpiCalc (live KPIs), aiAssistant + mcpServer (the AI assistant, via the /api/ai bridge). AI provider tokens are read from the AI_Assistant_Config DP — NONE are shipped.
